description: Shared Renovate policy for the dotfiles fleet. Extend it from any repo with `local>dotgibson/.github`.

packageRules.description: The fleet's own reusable workflows ride a moving @v3 major tag advanced by the release process (RELEASE-STRATEGY.md) — Renovate must never pin or bump them.
Group all third-party GitHub Actions bumps into one weekly PR, committed as `ci(deps):` to match the fleet's convention (replaces the per-repo Dependabot github-actions ecosystem).
